channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Goldman Sachs lifts 2026 oil forecasts: Brent $85, WTI $79 on Hormuz risk
item.description: Goldman Sachs raises oil forecasts as extended Hormuz disruption and structural supply risks lift long-term price expectations. Summary: Goldman Sachs lifts oil price forecasts on prolonged Hormuz disruption Bank now assumes flows operate at ~5% capacity for six weeks Recovery expected to take an additional month thereafter Structural risks seen dr... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Sometimes you have to 'escalate to de-escalate'
item.description: When asked in an NBS News interview on Sunday if President Donald Trump was “winding down” the war or “escalating” it, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said, they are not mutually exclusive. Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate.” Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: How Many Fed Rate Cuts Can We Now Expect in 2026?
item.description: Key PointsThe Fed has little to no clarity about what the impact of soaring energy prices will be. Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: New Zealand outlook cut to negative by Fitch as debt concerns mount
item.description: Fitch outlook cut puts New Zealand’s fiscal path under scrutiny and lifts yields. Summary: Fitch revises New Zealand outlook to Negative, affirms AA+ rating Concerns centre on delayed fiscal consolidation and rising debt Government debt projected to peak around 56% of GDP by FY27 Timeline for return to surplus pushed out to FY30 Economic recovery e... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Gulf shipping risks rise after blast near vessel off UAE Sharjah coast
item.description: Gulf shipping risks intensify as projectile incident near UAE signals widening threat zone. Trump isn't helping: Summary: Explosion reported near bulk carrier off Sharjah coast, crew unharmed Incident linked to rising attacks on commercial vessels in Gulf waters Blast occurred close to vessel, suggesting it may have been targeted Similar projectile... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Oil rises as Trump ultimatum to Iran fuels Hormuz escalation risks
item.description: Escalating US-Iran brinkmanship over Hormuz puts oil markets on edge and risks deeper supply shocks. Summary: Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum to Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz Iran warns of retaliation targeting US, Israeli, and Gulf energy infrastructure Brent closes near four-year highs as geopolitical risk intensifies Analysts see rising escalat... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Fundies Cheat Sheet: Mar 22–28, 2026 – PMI Pulse, Australian CPI & UK Data
item.description: Six central bank decisions and a hawkish Fed defined last week. Now flash PMIs, Australian CPI, and UK inflation data arrive against an active Iran conflict backdrop. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: BIS economist Shin Hyun-song named Bank of Korea governor
item.description: South Korean economist Shin Hyun-song, best known for predicting the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, was named on Sunday to head the central bank, facing inflation risk from the Iran war and uneven growth in Asia's fourth-largest economy. Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: Pronóstico Semanal de Forex – USD/JPY, Petróleo Crudo Brent, Gasolina, Índice S&P 500 - 22 marzo 2026
item.description: La escalada de la guerra en Oriente Medio está impulsando los precios de la energía al alza y las acciones a la baja, mientras que los bancos centrales, en general agresivos, están elevando los rendimientos. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: 'Moat Investing' Surges As U.S. Investors Seek Stability Amid Volatility
item.description: With rising energy prices and cautious central bank policy contributing to heightened volatility, investors are revisiting fundamentals and prioritising businesses that can protect profits over time, rather than chasing short‐term gains. Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: US Dollar Rises but Remains on Track for Weekly Loss Amid Inflationary Pressures
item.description: The US dollar rose on Saturday but remains poised to record weekly losses against major currencies. Investors have scaled back bets on Federal Reserve interest rate cuts, citing the potential for surging inflation driven by rising energy prices. Fuente: NewsData AUD

item.title: Soaring Oil Prices: What Do They Mean For The Canadian Economy And Entrepreneurs?
item.description: (MENAFN - Caribbean News Global) By BDC MONTREAL, Canada – The price of crude oil has surged 40 percent over the past two weeks, rising from USD 65 per barrel at the end of February to nearly ... Fuente: NewsData CAD

item.title: Knight Therapeutics Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
item.description: Knight Therapeutics (TSE:GUD) reported record fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on its March 19, 2026 earnings call, highlighting strong revenue growth, expanding contributions from recent Canadian acquisitions, and a growing cadence of launches across Canada and Latin America. Record 2025 results and Q4 outperformance President a... Fuente: NewsData CAD

item.title: Hong Kong firms face profit squeeze as US importers cut orders amid oil crisis
item.description: Some United States importers have cut orders and shifted to short-term contracts after the Middle East conflict triggered a global oil crisis, according to Hong Kong business leaders, who warned of eroding profit margins and strained liquidity. Jeffrey Lam Kin-fung, an Executive Council member and businessman, said on Sunday that the US-Israel war ... Fuente: NewsData JPY

item.title: ‘Trumpflation’: how the Iran war’s economic storm could affect Britons
item.description: Yet another cost of living crisis looms with fuel, food, holiday, energy and home loan prices expected to rise Middle East crisis – live updates Here we go again. For Britons it has been a rollercoaster few years and just as better times seemed ahead the country has been plunged into a fresh cost of living crisis. The economic storm caused by war i... Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: Dollar Slides as ECB Out-Hawks Fed Amid Oil Shock and Rising Inflation Risks
item.description: Dollar had every reason to rally last week, but instead ended as the worst performer among major currencies. Sharp selloff in global equities, surging Treasury yields, and escalating geopolitical risks would typically trigger strong safe-haven demand for the greenback. Yet, that relationship broke down. The key driver behind this anomaly is the gro... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: USD/CHF flat as Fed outlook and Oil-driven USD demand limit downside
item.description: The Swiss Franc (CHF) trades flat against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday, reversing part of its earlier gains as the Greenback eases slightly from daily highs. At the time of writing, USD/CHF is trading around 0.7878 after briefly touching the 0.7900 mark. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 20 March 2026
item.description: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q2 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes. Fuente: Bank of England

item.title: Pound Sterling Price News and Forecast: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as oil surges
item.description: The GBP/USD trims some of its Thursday’s gains, down by 0.84%, as traders turned risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East conflict and priced in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily high of 1.3442. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD strength vs Euro vulnerability: What’s next for the EUR/USD pair?
item.description: EUR/USD tests key level (1.1578) as the ECB's hawkish stance battles downside risks from Middle East conflict and spiking energy costs. The article analyzes the "April Hike" wildcard, NFP volatility, and critical technical levels. Outlook is split between technical recovery and fundamental risks. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as Oil surges, Fed outlook boosts US Dollar
item.description: GBP/USD trims some of its previous-day gains on Friday, down by 0.84%, as traders turn risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East war and price in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve (Fed) in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily high of 1.3442. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUD/USD falls as geopolitical tensions overshadow RBA rate hike
item.description: AUD/USD trades lower around 0.7040 on Friday at the time of writing, down 0.68% on the day, as the pair is pressured by a return of safe-haven demand despite supportive domestic factors in Australia. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Weekly Forecast: War continues to steal the limelight, and not for good
item.description: The EUR/USD pair bounced back in the last few days, settling for the week around 1.1530. The Iran war and central banks’ monetary policy announcements took centre stage, yet none was enough to impress speculative interest. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD Appreciates BoE Pause: Now Focus Shifts to Geopolitics
item.description: By Analytical Department RoboForex GBP/USD rose during the previous session and is now correcting to 1.3403. The pound responded positively to the Bank of England’s decision to keep interest rates unchanged, with market attention focused on the regulator’s guidance on how the Iran conflict might influence future policy. The Monetary Policy Committe... Fuente: InvestMacro

item.title: EUR/GBP rises as markets assess ECB and BoE rate decisions, inflation outlook
item.description: EUR/GBP edges higher on Friday, recovering losses recorded in the previous day after the European Central Bank (ECB) and Bank of England (BoE) monetary policy announcements. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/JPY rebounds as US Dollar strengthens, BoJ hawkishness tempers upside potential
item.description: USD/JPY trades around 158.70 on Friday at the time of writing, up 0.61% on the day, staging a clear rebound after Thursday’s sharp decline. The move comes as the US Dollar (USD) regains traction following a bout of volatility, with markets reassessing the outlook for US monetary policy. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Euro Gains on ECB Hike Bets but Lacks Breakout Without Policy Action
item.description: ECB rate hike expectations are gaining traction in markets, with growing speculation that tightening could begin as early as April. Major institutions including Barclays and J.P. Morgan are now forecasting an initial move next month, followed by additional hikes in June and July, reflecting a rapid shift in policy expectations amid rising inflation... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: GBP/USD retreats as BoE hawkish shift meets resilient US Dollar
item.description: GBP/USD retreats on Friday, trading around 1.3380 at the time of writing, down 0.39% on the day, after Thursday’s strong rally following the Bank of England (BoE) decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB's Makhlouf: Don't think ECB has a tightening bias
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker and Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland Gabriel Makhlouf stated during European trading hours on Friday that the central bank doesn’t have a pre-determined rate path and the decision would be made meeting by meeting. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB policymaker Villeroy: Potential rate hikes will be decided meeting by meeting
item.description: ECB will remain vigilant We will not be inactive or overreact to volatility in energy markets We have the ability to act if necessary, ready to do so to stabilise inflation at the 2% target A rate hike looks to be likelier than a rate cut, but the latter cannot be ruled out Potential rate hikes will be decided meeting by meeting We have the eyes on... Fuente: ForexLive
